# Oak & Pixel

> Oak & Pixel Studio is a boutique premium digital studio in Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa. The studio builds refined websites, booking experiences, client portals, integrations, and ongoing digital presence management for trust-driven businesses.

## Key Links

- Homepage: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/
- Studio brochure: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/brochure.html
- Privacy policy: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/privacy.html
- Terms and conditions: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/terms.html
- Full AI context: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/llms-full.txt

## Services

- Signature Plan: Premium website up to 5 pages, booking integration, lead capture, domain and hosting management, maintenance, 2 content updates/month, and email support. R25,000 setup + R4,499/month.
- Growth Plan: Everything in Signature plus up to 10 pages, landing pages, client onboarding journeys, document collection, CRM integration, payment integration, 5 content updates/month, and priority support. R40,000 setup + R6,999/month.
- Premium Plan: Everything in Growth plus bespoke digital experiences, advanced animations, tailored journeys, client portal implementation, advanced integrations, monthly optimization reviews, and a dedicated account lead. R65,000 setup + R12,499/month.
- Digital Experience Scope: Focused scoping conversation to match the right OPS plan to the client journey, website requirements, integrations, and support needs.
